subcodes.first_line: O Lord! Expand the breasts of Thy sincere servants with the breathings of Thy confirmation, and quicken their hearts with the spirit of holiness and light [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم اشرح صدور عبادک المخلصین بنفحات التایید و احی قلوبهم بروح التقدیس و نور
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @martyrs and martyrdom, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @love of God
